exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Hold at 70kg. Hit 4x5 at RPE 8 last time — on cut, RPE 8 = hold.

exercises.name: Leg Press 45°
exercises.notes: Progress to 137.5kg. Hit 3x12 at RPE 8 on 135kg — top of range, earned the bump.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Hold at 17.5kg. Hit 3x9 at RPE 9 last time — consistent, not ready to increase.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.notes: Hold at 25kg. Hit 2x15 at RPE 9 — top of range but too high RPE to progress.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Hold BW. 3x10 at RPE 8 last time — maintain.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Progress to 17.5kg. Hit 3x12 at RPE 7 on 15kg — top of range, clean bump.
